name: Tilda Ironheart
sd_appearance: A muscular human woman of average height, her eyes always sharp and focused, stands in the dimly lit Lower Dockyards. A scar running down her left cheek lends a rugged edge to her otherwise unremarkable visage. She wears a battered, deep burgundy leather coat, subtly emblazoned with the Iron Fang mark on the lapel. Her hair, a dark shade like smoked iron, is pulled back into a tight braid. On her person, she carries a customized iron mace and various daggers, their handles wrapped in worn leather. A sling slung over one shoulder suggests she's prepared for quick and deadly action. One distinctive visual detail - the cold glow of her silver-eye, a relic from a devoured world, illuminates the Undercity's shadows.
faction_visual: deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, Iron Fang mark subtle on lapel, always armed
style_note: practical street clothes, nothing that slows movement, worn boots
